query_text: lightweight freeride ski with good playfulness and powder float

results.explanation: Blizzard Rustler 10 strongly matches on: playfulness, powder_float, weight. Review: "Incredibly playful — you can butter, spin, and smear with ease" Review: "Pop off everything, spin easily, land softly" Review: "The rocker profile floats well in powder"

Salomon QST 106 strongly matches on: playfulness, powder_float. Review: "Handles variable snow conditions with ease" Review: "Playful enough for drops and airs" Review: "Floats beautifully in powder at 106mm"

Dynastar M-Free 108 strongly matches on: powder_float. Moderate match on: playfulness. Review: "Not as stiff but more playful" Review: "Not outstanding in any single category but competent everywhere off-piste, playfulness is nice" Review: "well-balanced between float and grip"

DPS Pagoda Tour 112 RP strongly matches on: playfulness, powder_float. Weak match on: weight. Review: "Downhill in powder is pure bliss" Review: "Handles beautifully in open bowls" Review: "float is unmatched"

Nordica Santa Ana 98 strongly matches on: powder_float. Moderate match on: playfulness. Review: "Playfulness is moderate" Review: "enough float for our wetter powder" Review: "floaty enough for powder"

Moderate match on: playfulness, powder_float. Weak match on: weight. Review: "good playfulness for an all-mountain ski" Review: "friendly in soft snow" Review: "100mm waist gives you enough float for powder days"

Elan Ripstick 96 strongly matches on: playfulness. Moderate match on: powder_float. Weak match on: weight. Review: "Decent playfulness and edge grip" Review: "Light and fun to ski" Review: "Wide enough for light powder"

ground_truth.reason: Carbon/flax keeps weight down (1900g), playfulness 7, float 8
